-0212 Technical Surveillance Countermeasures Specialist (Sgt-MSgt) (0211)
-0233 Intelligence Tactics Instructor (Sgt-MSgt) (open to all)
-0239 Intelligence Analyst (Sgt-Msgt) (open to all)
-0245 Target Mensuration Analyst (Sgt-MSgt) (0241)
-0271 Aviation Intelligence Specialist (Pvt-Gyst) (0231)
-0277 WTI Intelligence Marine (Pvt-MGySgt) (open to all AND SIGINT)

0211: CI/ HUMINT Specialist is a lateral move MOS, in which Marines are taught to ID and counteract threats, obtain intel using human beings, and conduct interrogations, debriefings, screenings and liaison operations.

A technical Surveillance Countermeasures Specialist (TSCM) must first hold a 0211 primary MOS. These Marines are trained to locate, identify and neutralize the threat of technical surveillance. Also are expected to know the techniques and employment of adversarial equipment.

All source fusion intelligence specialist. These Marines must be familiar with all phases and facet of intelligence operations. Typical duties include collection, recording, analysis, processing and dissemination. This is an entry level MOS.

Imagery Analysis Specialist (IMINT). These Marines are trained to process and analyze imagery gathered by various sensor platforms. Difference b/w this MOS and 0261 is that 0241s are trained to focus on a particular area and provide a much greater level of detail (CHECK). This is a LATERAL move MOS.

Geographic Intelligence Specialist (GEOINT). These Marines are trained to collect, analyze and process GEOPHYSICAL DATA and GEOGRAPHIC information. Difference b/w 0241s is their focus on looking at the broader geography to determine the effect geospatial information will have on operations (check)
Intelligence Chief (MGYSGT). Intelligence chiefs are the senior enlisted advisors on all intelligence disciplines and their application across the spectrum of military operations.
